channel.title: Posts on Sanjay Majumdar
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sanjay Majumdar

item.title: Exploring the Beauty of Nepal
item.description:
Nepal — The Land of Himalayas

Nepal is home to 8 of the world’s 14 highest peaks including Mount Everest.

Must Visit Places

  • 🏔️ Pokhara — City of lakes and mountains
  • 🛕 Kathmandu — Historic temples and culture
  • 🦏 Chitwan — Wildlife and nature

Stay tuned for detailed travel guides!

item.title: Introduction to Networking — Basics for Beginners
item.description:
What is a Network?

A network is a collection of computers and devices connected together to share resources.

Key Concepts

  • IP Address — Unique address for each device
  • Switch — Connects devices within a LAN
  • Router — Connects different networks together
  • Firewall — Protects network from unauthorized access

More detailed guides coming soon!

item.title: Welcome to Sanjay Majumdar's Blog
item.description:
Welcome to sanjaymajumdar.com.np!

Here you will find:

  • 📝 Blog — Personal thoughts and articles
  • 🎥 Vlog — Video content and reviews
  • ✈️ Travel — My travel experiences across Nepal and beyond
  • 🎭 Entertainment — Fun and entertainment content
  • 💻 Tech Tips — Networking, Security, Firewall, Switching & Routing guides
